active.name: Wildfire Nova
active.rawText: Deals 20 (+90% Magic) damage to all enemies and applies Burn for 4 turns.

passives.name: Combustion
passives.rawText: When an enemy affected by Burn dies, deal 15 (+30% Magic) damage to a random enemy.

passives.name: Smoldering Will
passives.rawText: Gain 2% Magic as bonus Shield for each turn Burn is active on an enemy.

passives.name: Ashen Reserve
passives.rawText: While benched, extend Burn duration on all enemies by 1 turn at the start of combat.
